Hey guys, welcome back. We're going to take a quick look at two different versions of the anthropomorphic activator. Still having trouble saying that. So the first one is going to be as a closing sales email from copy hackers 10x landing pages initial launch and then later an example as a cart abandonment. So first one subject line I'm not okay. Hey it's your landing page here. I either forgotten red headed stepchild of your marketing funnel. I either thing he sent thousands of hard earned click hard earned expensive clicks to yet haven't checked in for months to see how I was doing. Hint I'm not okay. Anyway I know it's weird that I'm reaching out to you like this but you left me no choice. So this is kind of the drastic times call for drastic measures. Here we're coming right off the bat. First line you know it's your landing page here. But you left me no choice because we need to talk and you've been ignoring my passive aggressive cries for help for far too long. You know like how I've been and here's how we agitate the pain while keeping the context of the anthropomorphic landing page. Giving you cringe worthy your CMO will kill you non ROI on your ad spend scaring away your visitors and making sure they never return making potential buyers bounce faster than an over caffeinated kangaroo. I thought that by doing all these things you'd finally pay attention to me. But no instead you've paid even more attention to your top funnel traffic strategy. So it's bloody ebooks nobody downloads because they have to read me to download them and I'm sure as hell not going to convince them. As far as I'm concerned no one should download all that free content you've been PDFing like you just discovered PDFs. So while you've been pulling together that next webinar or doubling down on Facebook ads I've been sulking here playing Bob Dylan's it's okay ma I'm only bleeding on infinite loop. I mean what the hell what does a landing page have to do to get a little love around here. So here we're really calling them out and being confrontational within the frame of the landing page which is something obviously we could never do if we were just talking to them as a marketer. And it wouldn't make me so freaking well angry if it wasn't for all the revenue we're leaving on the table. I mean I exist to place revenue generating leads at your feet. I exist to get people to sign up for your webinars and buy your products. That's literally all I'm here for. Yes I'm still here. Because did you know that with just a bit of strategic tweaking and then we seed a call to action here the kind the lady the kind the lady here can make really easy for you we could easily and then we list the benefits that they would share together if they just got our product. Look I'm not asking for much I'm very forgiving won't even hold a grudge but you need to meet me halfway. Remember when you left me left me open on one of your Chrome tabs intending to optimize me before choosing to watch Jerry Maguire Netflix instead. Yeah well I was watching too at one point he said something long lines of help me help you. Well I remember that line thinking it would be handy someday so here we are I'm playing the Jerry card. So here we're just getting a little bit fun and indulgent within the frame and yeah you could do that too. It's a fun one to play with. So what do you say? Help me help you. Joanna and her copy hackers gang are literally hours away from locking you and me out of their 10x landing pages course. Missing this would really suck so even though we're using urgency and scarcity here you know but the launch closing we're still doing it within the frame of talking as the landing page and that's really important you want to be holding that frame right until the end. Missing this would really suck because I need this okay I need this we need this and it's about damn time we committed ourselves to more profitable and loving marketing future together we can come back from the dark history of ours we can find landing page love again but only if you show me you care by 9 o'clock tonight. Sincerely landing page and then the PS just goes on talking a little bit more about some bonuses the landing page clinics but you can really see that we kept that frame throughout we were confrontational where we had to be we started right away saying it's your landing page here we agitated the pain from the perspective of the helpless landing page who is in pain and our prospect is the one who has the power to act and that's how we leverage all those persuasion principles that we spoke about in the main lesson. Cool so much shorter one is the cart abandonment one and it's a bit shorter it's hey a few minutes ago you were ready to take me home and now I sit here in this dank pixelized cart wondering what just happened I'm cold confused no idea what I'm doing in this cart when I should be here with you giving you benefit one two and three while freeing you from and biggest pain would go there so just a quick note this is a template that I created that could be used for just about any physical objects so fill in the blanks here even with your hey hey it's your I don't know what people buy online I never buy things online that's a lie but yeah hey it's your aluminum free deodorant here I think I just gave away the fact that I bought aluminum free deodorant online anyway moving on so give the benefits here while freeing you from biggest pain point there I'm destined for more than this and so are you author or company name and the rest of the company crew have turned off the lights and gone home for the day probably to throw back some nasty Merlot and play around with scrabble with the fam jam so what do you say so we're really just playing up the fact that this product is alone in a cart where it doesn't want to be it's not living its best life it's meant to be giving you these benefits and freeing you from that and you have the power to take it home with you we'll skip the Merlot and get straight to an action that leads to the benefit not like you should need it but if that's what it takes here's a 10% good Samaritan reward and then you could add a coupon code there so there you have it two examples one of them as a sales email ideally later in your launch sequence the other one would be a cart abandonment for e-commerce or physical products so put these to use and thank you so much for tuning into six figure emails it's been a blast hope to see you guys real soon
